import asyncio
import pytest
from source import AsyncCounter

@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_async_counter_final_count():
    counter = AsyncCounter()
    await asyncio.gather(*[counter.increment() for _ in range(50)])
    assert counter.count == 50, f"Expected final count to be 50, but got {counter.count}"
